programme.title: Ae Dil Hai Mushkil
programme.desc: Alizeh, an independent woman recovering from a breakup, and Ayan, a naive musician, meet in New York and form an incredible bond. From there, they experience love, heartbreak and the facts of life.

programme.title: Ghoomer
programme.desc: A batting prodigy believes her cricketing career is over after she loses her right hand in an accident. However, a failed cricketer takes a chance on her and trains her to be a bowler instead.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

programme.title: Murder 3
programme.desc: After Vikram's lover Nisha moves in with him, she experiences paranormal events around her. Her life takes an unexpected turn when Vikram is blamed for the disappearance of a former lover.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

programme.title: Matru Ki Bijlee Ka Mandola
programme.desc: Harry, his daughter, Bijlee, and his assistant, Matru, live in a remote village. Things get complicated when Bijlee, who is in love with Matru, chooses to marry the son of a powerful politician.

programme.title: Sanak
programme.desc: Vivaan, a skilled MMA trainer, takes his wife Anshika to the hospital for an urgent operation. However, he is forced to take action when a terrorist group takes Anshika and other patients hostage.

programme.title: Tanhaji: The Unsung Warrior
programme.desc: Tanhaji, a Maratha warrior, is Shivaji Maharaj's trusted lieutenant. When the Mughals invade and conquer Kondhana fort, he sets out to reclaim it for his king and country.

programme.title: Highway
programme.desc: Veera, a young bride-to-be, is abducted by a local gangster, Mahabir, and his men a day prior to her wedding. Far from being terrified of her abductor, Veera discovers a new meaning to her life.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.
